prompt: A dramatic anime action illustration inside an old wooden martial arts hall, showing two young women in mid-battle with explosive motion and elemental energy trails. In the foreground, a fierce female martial artist lunges low toward the viewer in a powerful punching stance, her right fist extended straight ahead and her body twisted dynamically. She has dark black hair tied into a messy high bun with loose strands and red ribbons, sharp intense eyes, and a focused combative expression. She wears a white traditional Chinese martial arts top with red trim, red tassel frog closures, and subtle embroidered patterns, paired with flowing deep red pants and black cloth shoes with red accents. Red ribbon-like energy and glowing scarlet brushstroke arcs coil around her arms, torso, and legs, sweeping across the frame like fiery calligraphy. In the upper right, a second young woman leaps through the air in a defensive or spellcasting pose, one hand stretched outward. She has light purple hair styled in two buns with trailing strands and ornate gold hair ornaments. She wears a dark green Chinese-style dress with gold embroidery, black stockings, and dark shoes. Bright blue water-like energy spirals around her in a large circular arc, splashing and glittering with luminous droplets. Set the scene in a weathered dojo or wuguan interior with tall wooden beams, hanging lanterns, broken floorboards, flying splinters, dust, sparks, and debris exploding from the impact of the fight. Include one large wooden signboard above them with the black calligraphy text 武术会, plus two vertical hanging banners, the left reading 以武会友 and the right reading 刚柔并济. Use a low-angle cinematic perspective, strong foreshortening, extreme motion, dense particles, and dramatic warm-vs-cool color contrast between the red and blue energy. Highly detailed anime painting, ultra-dynamic composition, sharp linework, rich textures, glowing effects, volumetric lighting, and epic battle key visual quality.
